MARINER_REQUEST [mdm-a1b2c3d4]: Create a full linkedin account for Sarah Johnson.

Profile details (JSON):
{
  "name": "Sarah Johnson",
  "platform": "linkedin",
  "oneLineSummary": {
    "oneLineSummary": "Create LinkedIn for Sarah Johnson senior marketing executive",
    "firstName": "Sarah",
    "lastName": "Johnson",
    "headline": "Senior Marketing Executive B2B Growth Specialist",
    "email": "sarah.johnson.mktg@outlook.com",
    "password": "SecurePass2024"
  }
}

## HOW TO EXECUTE — follow these steps in order using the exec/bash tool:

STEP 1 — Start the browser profile:
  node /data/director/dispatch.js '{"clientId":"mdm-a1b2c3d4","platform":"linkedin","steps":[{"action":"goto","url":"https://www.linkedin.com"}]}' --timeout 60

STEP 2 — If the user is not logged in, navigate to the account creation/signup page and fill in all profile details from the JSON above using dispatch.js steps (goto, click, type, fill).

STEP 3 — If already logged in, fill in/update profile details.

IMPORTANT: Use exec to run bash commands. Do NOT use ACP or sessions_spawn — use dispatch.js directly via exec.
Do NOT attempt to install plugins or runtime backends.

STEP 4 — When done (success or failure), POST to this webhook using exec/curl:
  curl -s -X POST -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
    -d '{"type":"account_created","execution_id":"test-exec-live-001","session_id":"mariner-mdm-a1b2c3d4-db8f5b0f","account_id":"mdm-a1b2c3d4","client_name":"Sarah Johnson","platform":"linkedin","status":"complete"}' \
    'https://wlowwprkjdhvfecsxsvp.supabase.co/functions/v1/mariner-webhook'

On failure use:
  curl -s -X POST -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
    -d '{"type":"account_created","execution_id":"test-exec-live-001","session_id":"mariner-mdm-a1b2c3d4-db8f5b0f","account_id":"mdm-a1b2c3d4","client_name":"Sarah Johnson","platform":"linkedin","status":"failed","error":"actual error here"}' \
    'https://wlowwprkjdhvfecsxsvp.supabase.co/functions/v1/mariner-webhook'

clientId=mdm-a1b2c3d4 platform=linkedin
